name: Pineapple Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Mix and pat onto bottoms and sides of 10-inch springform cake pan.
1 1/2 lb CREAM CHEESE, removed from wrappers and warmed in microwave on high for 1-1/2 minutes.
5 JUMBO EGGS, removed from shells and warmed 25 seconds in the microwave.
recipeInstructions:
CRUST
1. Mix graham crackers, sugar, melted butter, and press into prepared springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
3. Let cool completely.
CAKE FILLING
1. Remove cream cheese from wrappers and warm in microwave on high for 1-1/2 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine warmed cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, eggs, and heavy cream.
3. Mix until smooth.
4. Stir in cornstarch until no lumps remain.
5. Pour filling into crust.
6. Refrigerate at least 4 hours or overnight before serving.
